title: EFL Trigger Definition
description: Schema for reusable boolean trigger conditions. Triggers are evaluated at runtime against live game state — they have no meaning with the game off.

id.description: Unique trigger identifier, referenced by areas, warps, events, and other triggers.

type.description: allOf/anyOf compose other triggers. questComplete checks EFL quest state. flagSet checks a named flag.

flagName.description: Required when type is flagSet. Name of the EFL flag to test.

questId.description: Required when type is questComplete. EFL quest ID to test for completion.

conditions.description: Required when type is allOf or anyOf. Each entry is either a trigger ID or a flag literal ("flag:name").
